Table of Contents

Interface ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.CartoX
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CartoX.dll

Provides access to properties defining an dimension feature class to be created.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A5A640B6-BC3D-4CD2-9388-7686B21E2D2C")]
public interface ICreateDimensionFeatureClassDefinitionBridge

Properties

ConfigKeyword

The geodatabase configuration keyword.

string ConfigKeyword { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DimensionStyleCollectionJSON

A JSON string representing the collection of dimension styles associated with the dimension feature class.

string DimensionStyleCollectionJSON { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureClassName

The name of the feature class.

string FeatureClassName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureDataset

The feature dataset to create the dimension feature class in. If null, the feature class will be standalone.

IFeatureDataset FeatureDataset { set; }

Property Value

IFeatureDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

FeatureWorkspace

The workspace to create the dimension feature class in.

IFeatureWorkspace FeatureWorkspace { set; }

Property Value

IFeatureWorkspace

Examples

Sample Snippet

Fields

The fields collection to create the dimension feature class with. If null, default fields will be used.

IFields Fields { set; }

Property Value

IFields

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScale

The reference scale of the dimension feature class.

double ReferenceScale { set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceScaleUnit

The reference scale unit of the dimension feature class. Only applicable if the feature class has an unknown coordinate system.

IUnit ReferenceScaleUnit { set; }

Property Value

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShapeFieldName

The name of the shape field.

string ShapeFieldName { set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet
